name: SYON
short_description: A 2D horror to find and repel anomalies. Light the lantern of the girl and the ability of the ghost to fight back.
detailed_description:
A girl and a ghost, "Bakechan," are trapped in an apartment building.

While Bakechan's ability unlocks the exit,
Find and fight off the strange creatures while Bakechan's ability unlocks the exits.

1.Move Bakechan with the right stick or mouse.
2.Left stick or WASD to move the girl
3.When you find a mistake, move "Bakechan" to the location.
4.A button or Space long press to repel!
5.The game is over when there are 3 or more anomalies.

Aim for the top floor with Bake-chan.

SYON" is a side-scrolling horror and puzzle game.
The difficulty level increases as you progress, but it is basically EASY.

Play time

.30 to 60 min.
(More than 60 minutes including preparation & ending)

Video Distribution Guidelines

.All individuals and corporations are allowed to distribute videos without permission.
Monetization is only possible when using the functions provided by the video distribution site.
We would appreciate it if you include the name of the game in the title of the video or streaming video, or include a link to the Steam page in the summary section.

This game contains sensitive content, including illustrations and language that suggest suicide.
For those who are under the age range for which the game is intended or who require special consideration, we recommend displaying a warning screen at the beginning of the video clips or setting a warning on video-sharing websites.

We will not be held responsible for any damage caused by the distribution of this game.
We will not be held liable for any damages resulting from the distribution of videos of this game.
These guidelines are subject to change without notice.

Ending

.1 type
complete movie
